_comment: Copy to ~/.terminal-talk/config.json and edit. All fields optional; defaults apply.

voices._comment: edge_* are free neural voices from Microsoft Edge. openai_* are fallback voices used only when edge-tts is unreachable. Full voice list: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-services/speech-service/language-support?tabs=tts

playback._comment: speed 0.5-2.5x. auto_prune toggles whether played clips disappear after N seconds (3-600). Toggle off if you want clips to stack up for review.

speech_includes._comment: Global defaults for what gets spoken from Claude responses. Per-session overrides live in session-colours.json and win over these.

window._comment: Populated automatically — last-saved position + dock orientation. Delete these keys to reset to centred-top on next launch.
